name: Wicklow Pancake (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs lightly.
2. Add the milk, breadcrumbs, herbs, salt, and pepper.
3. Mix well until combined.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a pan until foaming.
5. Pour in the mixture and cook over low flame.
6. Cook until brown underneath and just set on top.
7. Finish under the grill.
8. Serve cut into wedges with a knob of butter on each portion.
